calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-22-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Margaret O'Dowd appeared by telephone for Sandra Crowley (Administrator).

The Court noted that this is seeking that a correction be made to the previous order for final distribution because the title to the real property is a little different, that the bank accounts weren't identified at that time and questions what level of due diligence was done with respect to title of the real property. Ms. O'Dowd stated that they thought the real property was in joint tenancy with the Mother and the two Daughters, but that it wasn't according to the title company and that it was an old deed. Ms. O'Dowd also stated that they assumed that when the Mother quit claimed the property to the Daughters that it was in joint tenancy, but the title company took a different position. In addition, Ms. O'Dowd stated that there were 25 bank accounts, that the bank provided wrong information, and that they were first told the accounts were held in joint tenancy by Patricia and Mary, and then at time of distribution were told that the accounts were in the sole name of Mary. The Court noted that this will vacate the prior order for final distribution and stated that it wants an order that covers everything for final distribution including these changes. The Petition for Amendment of Order, etc. is under submission. Ms. O'Dowd is to provide a form of order by e-mail to the Probate Examiner or by drop off in the Probate drop off box.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Cabasares. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-25-2020 Continued To Jul-07-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing Estate
Off Calendar Mar-04-2020 Off Calendar

Petition For Declaratory Relief To Reform 1995 Quitclaim Deed For 525 Ortega Street San Francisco, Ca
Off Calendar Sep-03-2019 Advanced From Nov-13-19 To Oct-07-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Declaratory Relief To Reform 1995 Quitclaim Deed For 525 Ortega Street San Francisco, Ca
Off Calendar Nov-04-2019 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Margaret O'Dowd for Sandra Crowley (Petitioner).
Michael Dubin for Jacqueline Crowley (soon-to-be Petitioner).

Mr. Dubin stated that he got the signature today and will file the petition today or tomorrow. Ms. O'Dowd stated that the judge denied the petition to reform deed. The Amended Petition for Declaratory Relief to Reform 1995 Quitclaim Deed for 525 Ortega Street, San Francisco, CA is off calendar to set next petition.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

Petition For Declaratory Relief To Reform 1995 Quitclaim Deed For 525 Ortega Street San Francisco, Ca
Off Calendar Oct-07-2019 Continued To Nov-04-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Margaret O'Dowd for Sandra Crowley (Petitioner)

The Court noted a new probate is needed to get proper distribution under probate estate, the property didn't transfer in joint tenancy, the quit claim deed terminated the 1/3 interest, and can't reform the deed. Ms. O'Dowd stated she can file a petition for probate fairly quickly.

The amended petition for declaratory relief to reform 1995 quitclaim deed for 525 Ortega Street, San Francisco CA is continued to November 4, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Charlene P. Kiesselbach. Clerk: S. Le. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.
